version_pin_rationale: libglvnd 1.4.0-1 is the jammy release build. GL Vendor Neutral Dispatch library. THIS WAS A HIDDEN DE0-G DEP — DE0-G's mesa.json installs libEGL_mesa.so.0 (the Mesa vendor implementation) but NOT libEGL.so.1 (the libglvnd dispatcher). sway 1.7 + wlroots 0.15 dlsym against libEGL.so.1 + libGLESv2.so.2 via the libglvnd dispatcher API; if the binary linker walks ld.so.conf.d and finds Mesa's libEGL_mesa.so.0 first without the dispatcher present, the GL_VERSION query returns NULL and sway aborts at startup. Plant BOTH .debs (libegl1 for EGL dispatch, libgles2 for GLES dispatch). The dispatcher reads /usr/share/glvnd/egl_vendor.d/*.json to find vendor libraries; DE0-G's mesa.json already plants 50_mesa.json under the mesa store dir, and DE-H1's build script writes a /etc/profile.d/glvnd.sh exporting __EGL_VENDOR_LIBRARY_DIRS to find it.
